title: 5 Low-Beta High-Yielding Stocks for a Likely Volatile September
text: We have narrowed our search to five large-cap low-beta stocks with a solid dividend yield. These are: ETR, IEP, SO, NI, NNN.

title: NiSource, Inc. (NI) CEO Lloyd Yates on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: NiSource, Inc.
